LanguageData.CAO.BeginSampling.Desc: Snapshot current stored resources. Net stockpile change from now until archival sets the outpost's per-resource rate (surplus shipped home, deficit drawn from carried reserves).
LanguageData.CAO.Archive.Desc: Destroy this colony's map. All colony pawns (colonists, animals, prisoners) and stored goods move into an abstract outpost that keeps producing the sampled surplus and ships it home.
LanguageData.CAO.LastBase: Cannot archive your last home base — there would be nowhere to deliver resources.
